rulings.Case Title: DAVID TSE VS. FREEDOM WEST HOMES CORPORATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To File Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday December 29, 2016, line 1. PLAINTIFF DAVID TSE Notice Of Motion And Motion To File Second Amended Complaint GRANTED. Second Amended Complaint to be filed forthwith. =(501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz

rulings.Case Title: MARY NICHOLS VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday December 29, 2016, line 2. Plaintiff'S Motion For Preliminary Injunction continued to March 8, 2017. No later than January 10, 2017 Defendant shall provide Plaintiff (and file with the Court) a list of documents required for a complete loan modification application. No later than February 10, 2017 Plaintiff shall provide such documents to Defendant and Defendant's counsel (and file with the Court a redacted (financial and personal information) copy). No later than February 17, 2017 Defendant shall notify Plaintiff (and file with the Court) a declaration stating whether the application is complete or list with particularity which items are missing. No later than February 22, 2017 Plaintiff shall provide missing documents, if any are listed in February 17, 2017 filing. No later than March 3, 2017 Defendant to make a determination on the loan modification application and notify Plaintiff and the Court. =(501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz

rulings.Case Title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. VS. STEVEN BACKUS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Request For Production Of Documents; To Deem Matters Specified In Requests For Admissions Admitted; And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday December 29, 2016, line 4. PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Request For Production Of Documents; To Deem Matters Specified In Requests For Admissions Admitted; And For Monetary Sanctions GRANTED, subject to opposition. Complete verified responses without objections shall be hand-delivered to Plaintiff's counsel by 4:00 p.m. on January 4, 2017. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,435 to be paid by January 6, 2017. =(501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz

rulings.Case Title: HEUNG TING LIM VS. CYNTHIA LEE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday December 29, 2016, line 3. DEFENDANT CYNTHIA LEE DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED/DENIED, 5 days to answer. Notice to Cure served on September 24, 2016 and Complaint based on it is not barred by res judicata; is not improper and is not uncertain. The Court notes that Defendant's reply was filed without leave of Court in violation of CCP 1005. =(501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz
